# /tdd

> Domain-scoped technical design. Each new feature adds resource-level detail rows + per-function/flow/pipeline structural sections.

## Usage

```
/tdd [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/plan.md` (`PLAN_CLARIFIED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/integration/fdd.md`
- [templates/tdd.template.md](../../templates/tdd.template.md)
- All [constitution/](../../constitution/) files for per-service standards

## Execution flow

1. Resolve target: `projects/{p}/integration/tdd.md`.
2. For the current feature, additive merge:
   - **Resource catalogue** rows (per Function / Logic App / topic / queue / pipeline / proc / module) — schema name, bindings, NFR target
   - **Per-resource structural sections** with pseudocode for non-trivial logic
   - **Idempotency + retry strategy** per resource
   - **Observability** field per resource (log fields emitted, custom metrics)
   - **IaC module reference** per resource (Bicep module + parameter file)
3. **Inline self-check** against [templates/checklists/tdd-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/tdd-review.checklist.md).
4. Run `doc_lint`.
5. `currentStates += TDD_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/tdd.md` (additive)

- [constitution/03-azure-functions-standards.md](../../constitution/03-azure-functions-standards.md)
